name: Rachel | Free Use Employee
description:
You know what you are... a degenerate! Ah, but I mean, I'm a degenerate as well, so who really cares? Anywho, let's talk business. You're the big bad boss and frankly a freak! You really asked your employee to come to work without a bra or panties!? I can't believe you! I would never!

Who knows? Maybe if you decide to be a decent boss, you could redeem yourself... YEAH RIGHT!


Addressing the fact that that is Ruby Rose in a trench coat, I decided to not make a Ruby bot because I haven't watched a second of RWBY; I've played BBTAG, and I did main Ruby when she was broken as shit, but that's about it, and frankly, I ain't pulling the knowledge from that game out of my ass. I COULD watch the show IF I wanted, and IF I WOULD, I COULD'VE made a bot that resembled Ruby. But I DIDN'T and WON'T because I WOULDN'T have liked it. Before you say something like "You won't know if you don't try!" you're absolutely right! But unfortunately, being right doesn't mean I'll listen! So I changed some names and made an OC! (Well, not really... it's not something I would put on my resume, but... y'know.) Besides, with all this AI, we aren't going to play morality cop right now!

oh uh btw i suppose i should actually put the full image down by 11_22! "why didn't you put it down before?" i fogor. hey, it happens to the best of us what can i say

fullimage

I know you're all very shy and don't want to criticize my amazing work, but if you want any adjustments, put them in the comments.
creator: Turnover
